/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/5g_layer2.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/5g_layer2.dir/src/ip_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/5g_layer2.dir/src/pdcp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/5g_layer2.dir/src/rlc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/5g_layer2.dir/src/mac.cpp.o  -o 5g_layer2  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
